queries.question: Show all day shift job postings for nurses and physical therapists.
queries.sql:
SELECT JobPostings.title 
FROM JobPostings
WHERE (JobPostings.healthcare = "Nurse" OR JobPostings.healthcare = "Physical Therapist") AND JobPostings.shift = "Day Shift"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?jobpostings a :JobPostings .
  ?jobpostings p:title ?title .
  ?jobpostings p:healthcare ?healthcare_w .
  ?jobpostings p:healthcare ?healthcare_w2 .
  ?jobpostings p:shift ?shift_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?healthcare_w) = "Nurse" || STR(?healthcare_w2) = "Physical Therapist")) && STR(?shift_w) = "Day Shift"))
}

queries.question: Show all the job postings for nurses, and just the day shift job postings for physical therapists.
queries.sql:
SELECT JobPostings.title 
FROM JobPostings
WHERE JobPostings.healthcare = "Nurse" OR JobPostings.healthcare = "Physical Therapist" AND JobPostings.shift = "Day Shift"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?jobpostings a :JobPostings .
  ?jobpostings p:title ?title .
  ?jobpostings p:healthcare ?healthcare_w .
  ?jobpostings p:healthcare ?healthcare_w2 .
  ?jobpostings p:shift ?shift_w .
  FILTER((STR(?healthcare_w) = "Nurse" || (STR(?healthcare_w2) = "Physical Therapist" && STR(?shift_w) = "Day Shift")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show all job postings for nurses and physical therapists which are on the day shift.
